title: Medical Laboratory Techniques Program Educational Objectives
content:
Medical Laboratory Techniques Program Educational Objectives

1-) To train professionals who combine theoretical knowledge with practice, know medical ethics, have a sense of social responsibility respect patient rights, and can fulfill their assigned duties based on universal science and education principles in the health sector,

2) To train medical laboratory technicians who have the knowledge and equipment to accept samples to the laboratory for routine analyses needed in the diagnosis, prognosis, and treatment processes of various diseases, to analyze, finalize, and report the findings,

3) To produce qualified graduates who can take part in business structures and organizations in the medical and health sector, are competent in the use of medical devices and tools in the laboratory, know the quality control processes in the laboratory, produce effective solutions to the problems encountered, are compatible with teamwork, are open to professional development and follow scientific and technological developments.
